ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the AI agent */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Learning algorithm used by the agent */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agent was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the agent (e.g., active, inactive, training, or deployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the virtual environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the environment (e.g., active, inactive, or under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rl_episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the agents table */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the environments table */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* The time step within the episode */,
  "avg_action_dist" TEXT /* Average action distribution probabilities */,
  "obs" TEXT /* Observations from the environment */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions taken by the agent */,
  "rewards" REAL /* Rewards received by the agent */,
  "human_obs" TEXT /* Human-readable observations */,
  "logstd_action_dist" TEXT /* Log standard deviation of action distribution */,
  "original_rewards" REAL /* Original rewards before any modifications */,
  "episode_status" TEXT /* Current status of the episode (e.g., in_progress, completed, or failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode ended */,
  "total_reward" REAL /* Cumulative reward for the entire episode */,
  "action_counts" INTEGER /* Number of actions taken by the agent */,
  "observation_counts" INTEGER /* Number of observations received from the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "timestep"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rl_episodes_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rl_episodes_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)
column_names: Learning algorithm used by the agent
